mission.title: dragonfly: Add bloom/cuckoo filter support
mission.description: Add bloom/cuckoo filter support. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current dragonfly deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
helm list -n dragonfly 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dragonfly installation.

steps.title: Review dragonfly configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly
```
The redis bloom module is very popular. Probabilistic data structures are required for many problems.

Basic bloom / counting bloom support at minimum. Ideally full compatibility with redis bloom module.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add bloom/cuckoo filter support
steps.description:
Addresses https://github.com/dragonflydb/dragonfly/issues/1275

Still missing: persistence support.
```yaml
> BF.RESERVE bikes:models 0.001 1000000
OK
> BF.ADD bikes:models "Smoky Mountain Striker"
(integer) 1
> BF.EXISTS bikes:models "Smoky Mountain Striker"
(integer) 1
> BF.MADD bikes:models "Rocky Mountain Racer" "Cloudy City Cruiser" "Windy City Wippet"
1) (integer) 1
2) (integer) 1
3) (integer) 1
> BF.MEXISTS bikes:models "Rocky Mountain Racer" "Cloudy City Cruiser" "Windy City Wippet"
1) (integer) 1
2) (integer) 1
3) (integer) 1
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add bloom/cuckoo filter support" is functioning correctly.

OK

(integer) 1
> BF.EXISTS bikes:models "Smoky Mountain Striker"

> CCF.RESERVE bikes:inventory 1000000
OK

> CCF.EXISTS bikes:inventory "Smoky Mountain Striker" 
(integer) 1
> CCF.COUNT bikes:inventory "Smoky Mountain Striker"

(integer) 1

(integer) 1

(integer) 0
> CCF.MADD bikes:inventory "Rocky Mountain Racer" "Cloudy City Cruiser" "Windy City Wippet"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dragonfly installed or the issue environment reproducible.
